step_rationale: Generic cell-cycle marker; detected in peri-infarct region but not mechanistically on cascade.
mechanism: Proliferating cell nuclear antigen marks cellular proliferation in post-infarct healing but is off-pathway to atherothrombotic MI.

references.title: Human umbilical cord-derived endothelial progenitor cells promote growth cytokines-mediated neorevascularization in rat myocardial infarction.
